subcodes.first_line: O my God, my God! Thou seest the ardour of my sighs, the streaming of my tears, the blazing of my burning heart, and hearest the tumult [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی تری تلهب زفراتی و تحلب عبراتی و تطلع باجیج احتراقی و تسمع ضجیج
subcodes.subjects: @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @prayer for nearness to God, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
